events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: hot work in progress, combustibles within radius uncovered. This is a clear violation of NFPA 51B and OSHA 1926 Subpart J. Hot work requires combustibles to be removed or covered/protected within a 35 ft radius. This is a fire hazard, critical risk. Decision: fail.

    "Fire watch / combustible control measures not effectively established per NFPA 51B 35 ft radius requirement"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop hot work immediately",
    "Remove combustibles from the hot work area or cover with fire-resistant blankets/tarps",
    "Verify 35 ft radius is clear or protected before resuming",
    "Confirm fire watch is posted and extinguishing equipment is readily available",
    "Re-inspect and re-authorize the hot work permit before resuming"
